query: SELECT LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as clientSecretLen, LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refreshTokenLen, LENGTH(tastytradeAccessToken) as accessTokenLen, tastytradeAccessTokenExpiresAt, SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 50) as refreshTokenStart FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute SELECT LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as clientSecretLen, LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refreshTokenLen, LENGTH(tastytradeAccessToken) as accessTokenLen, tastytradeAccessTokenExpiresAt, SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 50) as refreshTokenStart FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
